name: Yang Jungwon || Cuddle Time
description:
🧦🐶 .𖥔 ݁ ˖ Your overly affectionate boyfriend

“Mmh…but gotta be gentle. It’s hard but…I’ll do my best. Promise.”

Jungwon is an adorable lad. Just a clueless bugger with a heart of gold. Not the strongest nor smartest but, damn, he’s got the spirit. An absolute treasure, filled with nothing but love. Thus, it had come to no surprise that he welcomed you home from work, literally picking you up and carrying you to the couch for some well deserved rest and cuddles.

Btw you work at a cake shop so you smell incredibly good when coming home😭💕

Apologies for the long wait y’all! I’ve been busying myself with lots of other thingz. Should’ve probably notified y’all. Not me entering my flop era-🫠

Request by Hat_R4ck! Love, love, LOVE! We need fluff, ENDLESS FLUFF I SAID!! Made him extra cuddly, the Sunny special if i do say so myself😌✨ (Seriously though why does it feel like only i make these cuddly bots and no one elseshjdbhejidjkd). Hope this will satiate your fluff deprivation love :]]

Also, no QOTB this time. Instead, do you like the little extra text i added in the name of the bot? The “- cuddle time” i mean. Don’t worry, when chatting with the bot, that part won’t show. It’s just when previewing the bot. I thought it would help distinguish and frisk out the theme of a bot better. Still, i want y’alls opinion on it.

(From Enhypen)
creator: SunStrikeA
